title: Add a real repository validation script and use it as the publish gate
acceptance: The repo contains a deterministic validation script for this kit
Validation checks the loop JSON files, Python scripts, and skill metadata without placeholder commands
The version can be published with the new validation gate
notes: This calibrates the repo for the rest of the loop.

title: Fix publish ordering so loop state and backlog updates are committed in the same version
acceptance: Publishing a version does not leave dirty tracked state files behind
State and backlog updates for a published version are included in the same commit
notes: A dirty worktree after publish undermines loop reliability.

title: Add a reference that defines what high-quality project data means for the loop
acceptance: A new reference file defines required data sources, freshness, confidence, and evidence hierarchy
The protocol points to that reference when data quality matters
notes: This defines the target standard before adding scripts.

title: Add a structured schema for project data snapshots and evidence
acceptance: The repo contains a durable JSON schema or template for collected project data
The schema can represent repo facts, commands, risks, and evidence quality
notes: The loop needs a concrete shape for collected data.

title: Add a script that collects first-pass project data into a snapshot file
acceptance: A script can collect basic repo and git signals into a machine-readable artifact
The artifact is suitable for later scoring and reporting
notes: This turns data acquisition into an explicit step.

title: Add a script that scores whether the collected project data is good enough to act on
acceptance: The repo contains a scoring or checklist script for snapshot quality
The scoring output highlights missing signals or stale data
notes: The loop should know whether it has enough context.

title: Integrate data snapshot and quality state into the loop's durable state model
acceptance: State or related artifacts can record where the latest data snapshot lives
The protocol explains when to refresh data before acting
notes: Collected data should survive context loss.

title: Extend reports to include evidence sources and data quality observations
acceptance: The report template captures data sources and evidence quality
Write-report workflow can record these observations cleanly
notes: Reports should explain why the loop trusted its context.

title: Improve next-goal selection using data quality gaps and evidence gaps
acceptance: Goal selection can favor tasks that close the biggest data or evidence gaps
The logic stays deterministic and understandable
notes: This links collected data to planning quality.

title: Align wrappers, protocol, README, and examples around high-quality project data acquisition
acceptance: Public docs, wrappers, and examples consistently describe the data acquisition flow
The repo defaults are coherent after the first nine iterations
notes: Finish with consistency, docs, and example polish.
